steps: Ethanol 70%+Acid Acetic*, few seconds (control differentiation yourself). (*add 2-3 dropsof acetic acid 100% in 100ml ethanol 70%).
Xylene, 1min or more (under the hood) until mounting
Mount coverslip with DPX (under the hood)
